non-binding term sheet — strategic cooperation draft (ksa)
parties: sahab express cjsc (cr 2099-xx-000) and amber dunes retail llc (cr 101-yy-888), both incorporated in the kingdom of saudi arabia.
purpose: draft framework for a distribution alliance and potential strategic options; no pricing, no percentages, and no securities terms are set in this draft.
issuer context: amber dunes retail llc is reviewing public cma and tadawul nomu materials for a possible future application; only public sources are referenced.
pdpl compliance: national id/iqama fields of signatories are not collected in this draft; any future processing will be registered and, if cross-border, notified to sdaia per pdpl.
form labels (placeholders only): authorised signatory name ______; national id/iqama ______; cr no. ______; bank account ref ______; none required at this stage.
definitive documents: any investment or acquisition, if pursued, will be subject to negotiation and execution of definitive agreements; mae language is expressly negated for routine seasonal sales dips and spa-day campaign cancellations.
embargo for ir workflow testing: do not circulate beyond internal ir drafts until 1448-02-05h, 12:00 ksa time (illustrative only).
approvals and regulator touchpoints: any actual transaction would require board resolutions and, if applicable, cma notifications in line with publicly available market conduct guidance.
public references: tadawul listing rules (public), cma market conduct faq (public), and sdaia pdpl regulations (public) are the only materials relied upon.
communications: investor-relations draft email to ir@amberdunes.sa (role mailbox); public helpline for general queries: cma contact center 800-000-0000 (placeholder).
project-management notes: v0.2 draft, lowercase housekeeping, no press engagement, next check-in after eid break, attach stale research note already posted on the company blog.
closing prerequisites (illustrative): corporate approvals per the companies law; ksa law governing; no announcement obligations triggered by this draft.
sample checklist items: verify cr extracts; confirm no pdpl cross-border transfer; reconcile supplier codes; prepare board memo shell without any amounts.
disclaimer: this outline is not an offer or a recommendation; all numbers, dates, and fields herein are placeholders and do not contain live market-sensitive information.
